name: Vuestic UI
description: Open-source Vue 3 component library designed for rapid development, easy maintenance, and high accessibility

description.value: Open-source Vue 3 component library designed for rapid development, easy maintenance, and high accessibility

active-maintenance.comment: Active development; 3,763 commits; latest v1.10.3 released Oct 17, 2024; 134 contributors

initial-release.comment: First release in 2019; major Vue 3 rewrite released May 2021

framework.comment: Built specifically for Vue 3; also supports Web Components export

styling-approach.comment: Uses SCSS (3.5% of codebase) with CSS custom properties for theming; can integrate with Tailwind via @vuestic/tailwind package

component-model.comment: Styled component library with ready-to-use visual design; no headless/unstyled mode

typescript.comment: TypeScript comprises 45.5% of codebase; fully typed components with type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: Full SSR support; official Nuxt 3 module (@vuestic/nuxt); works with Vite SSR, ViteSSG

rsc-compatible.comment: N/A - React Server Components are React-specific; Vuestic UI is for Vue

design-system.comment: Custom design system with two built-in color presets (light and dark); design-agnostic approach

dark-mode.comment: Built-in dark mode with automatic detection via prefers-color-scheme; manual switching and localStorage persistence

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive theming via createVuestic config; color customization with semantic color variables

css-variables.comment: Uses CSS custom properties (--va-primary, --va-secondary, etc.) for all theme colors and styling

design-tokens.comment: Color tokens system with primary, secondary, success, info, danger, warning, background, and text tokens

rtl-support.comment: No explicit RTL documentation found; feature not prominently advertised or documented

component-count.comment: 60+ pre-built Vue 3 components; some sources cite 50+ or 71 components

text-input.comment: va-input component with outlined/solid/bordered styles; supports placeholder, label, validation

radio.comment: va-radio component for radio button groups

slider.comment: va-slider component for range values; visualization for number input

number-input.comment: va-counter component for numeric input with increment/decrement

tag-input.comment: Tag input functionality available via select with multiple mode

color-picker.comment: va-color-input with advanced picker, palette picker, and slider picker modes; composed of 7 color picker components

date-picker.comment: va-date-picker with day/month/year views; supports single, multiple, and range selection

time-picker.comment: va-time-picker with 12/24 hour format; hours, minutes, seconds selection; filtering support

date-range-picker.comment: va-date-picker supports range selection mode for start and end dates

file-upload.comment: va-file-upload with single/list/gallery types; supports file preview in gallery mode

dropzone.comment: va-file-upload with dropzone prop enables drag-and-drop file upload

rating-input.comment: va-rating with custom colors, icons, half-value selection, clearable option; keyboard accessible

input-groups.comment: Input slots support prepend/append icons and content

input-with-dropdown.comment: No dedicated input with dropdown component found in documentation

split-button.comment: va-button-dropdown with split prop for button with dropdown actions

table.comment: Basic va-table with .va-table class; supports hoverable, striped, clickable rows

data-table.comment: va-data-table with sorting, filtering, pagination, virtual scrolling, selection, inline editing, CRUD operations

virtual-infinite-list.comment: va-data-table supports virtual scrolling via virtual-scroller prop for large datasets

tree-view.comment: va-tree-view with expandable nodes, checkboxes, selectable modes (leaf/independent), filtering

list-view.comment: va-list and va-list-item components for styled lists

avatar.comment: va-avatar component with image support and fallback

timeline.comment: va-timeline component for vertical timeline of events

calendar.comment: Date picker component can serve as calendar display with day/month/year views

alert.comment: va-alert component for static alert/banner messages

toast-notification.comment: va-toast component for temporary popup notifications

skeleton.comment: va-skeleton for content placeholders during loading

empty-state.comment: No dedicated empty state component found in documentation

modal-dialog.comment: va-modal component for centered overlay dialogs

drawer-sheet.comment: Modal component can be configured for slide-in behavior; sidebar can serve as drawer

popover.comment: va-popover for floating content anchored to trigger

dropdown-menu.comment: va-menu-list, va-dropdown components for action menus

context-menu.comment: No dedicated right-click context menu component found in documentation

command-palette.comment: No command palette component (Cmd+K style) found in documentation

tabs.comment: va-tabs component for tab-based content switching

breadcrumb.comment: va-breadcrumbs component for hierarchical path navigation

pagination.comment: va-pagination component for page navigation controls

stepper.comment: va-stepper with Previous/Next navigation, validation support, linear mode, horizontal/vertical orientations

navigation-menu.comment: Navigation components including sidebar and menu items

sidebar.comment: va-sidebar with minimized/hoverable modes, left/right positioning, nested items with accordion/collapse

bottom-navigation.comment: No dedicated mobile-style bottom navigation component found

grid.comment: No dedicated Grid layout component; relies on CSS utilities or Tailwind integration

container.comment: va-content component for centered max-width container

collapsible.comment: va-accordion and va-collapse components for expandable content sections

resizable.comment: No dedicated user-resizable panels component found

splitter.comment: va-split component for resizable split panes

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integration found in documentation

code-editors.comment: No official code editor integration found in documentation

chart-libraries.comment: Charts mentioned as available in Vuestic Admin template but not as part of core UI library

form-libraries.comment: No official form library integration; built-in validation via rules prop on inputs

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in transitions and animations for component interactions

icon-libraries.comment: Built-in icon support via va-icon component; supports custom icons

date-libraries.comment: Date picker has built-in date handling; no external date library required

aria-compliant.comment: Full WAI-ARIA coverage following W3C standards; components provide screen-reader compatible information

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard support: Tab/Shift+Tab navigation, Enter activation, Arrow keys for selection, Esc for closing

screen-reader-tested.comment: Components described as 'fully covered by WAI-ARIA attributes' for screen reader compatibility

focus-management.comment: Visual focus states for keyboard-navigated elements; focus-visible styles implemented

wcag-level.comment: No specific WCAG compliance level (A/AA/AAA) stated in documentation

accessibility-rating.comment: Good accessibility with WAI-ARIA coverage, keyboard navigation, focus management; accessibility is a core design principle; no explicit WCAG level stated

bundle-size-full.comment: 186 KB minified + gzipped (full library); v1.10 focused on bundle size reductions

bundle-size-core.comment: Tree-shakeable - import components individually; no single 'core' bundle measurement available

tree-shakeable.comment: Supports tree-shaking; components can be imported individually

zero-runtime.comment: Components require runtime JavaScript; not a zero-runtime solution

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be loaded on demand via dynamic imports

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with 13+ examples per component, props tables, events, slots, CSS variables, code copy; excellent API reference coverage

interactive-docs.comment: Live playground demonstrations on each component page; 'Show Code', 'Copy Code', 'Open in GitHub' options

storybook.comment: Official Storybook at ui-storybook.vuestic.dev; used for component development; documentation guide in progress

figma-kit.comment: Official Vuestic UI Figma kit available on Figma Community

cli-generator.comment: npm create vuestic@latest for scaffolding new Vite or Nuxt projects with Vuestic

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: Approximately 2,421 weekly downloads; classified as 'popular' on npm

commercial-support.comment: Professional support and consulting services available from Epicmax core team

style-override.comment: Override via className, CSS variables (--va-*), global config, and slots; per-component CSS variable customization

compound-components.comment: Pattern used in Accordion (va-collapse), Sidebar (VaSidebarItem), Menu (VaMenuItem, VaMenuGroup)

render-props.comment: Vue uses slots pattern rather than render props

slots.comment: Extensive slot support throughout; content, icon, icon-toggle slots for customization

unstyled-mode.comment: No unstyled/headless mode available; Vuestic UI is a styled component library
